name: create_image
description: Generate images from text prompts using open-source diffusion models like Stable Diffusion XL and FLUX. Returns base64-encoded image data or URLs with configurable resolution, inference steps, guidance scale, and seed for reproducibility.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The image model ID to use (e.g. 'stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0').

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: A text description of the desired image.
parameters.example: A serene mountain landscape at sunset with a calm lake in the foreground

parameters.name: n
parameters.description: Number of images to generate. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: Width of the generated image in pixels.

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Height of the generated image in pixels.

parameters.name: steps
parameters.description: Number of diffusion steps. More steps generally produce higher quality images.

parameters.name: seed
parameters.description: Random seed for reproducible generation. Same seed with same prompt produces the same image.

parameters.name: negative_prompt
parameters.description: Text describing what should not appear in the image.

body.prompt: A serene mountain landscape at sunset with a calm lake in the foreground
